name: Fagradalsfjall
eruptionHistory: Series of eruptions beginning March 2021 after ~800 years of dormancy on the Reykjanes Peninsula. Multiple eruptions in 2021, 2022, 2023, and 2024.
description: Fagradalsfjall marked the beginning of a new volcanic era on the Reykjanes Peninsula. The accessible eruptions near Reykjavik attracted hundreds of thousands of visitors.
